name: Kingpin Bowling
author: Poki
description: Kingpin Bowling is an arcade sports game created by Frosty Pop. Bowling has never been so fun or colorful! Steer your way down the bowling lane and try to avoid obstacles like spilled sodas, donuts, pencils, and more! Hit all the pins in a row to activate strike mode and rack up coins. Are you ready for an unforgettable bowling experience? Controls: Left/right arrow - move left/right About the creator: Kingpin Bowling is an arcade sports game created by Frosty Pop. This is their first game on Poki!
